basic_info.description: 👋 Full-stack developer with ~2 years of experience building scalable web applications using JavaScript ecosystems and modern backend technologies. Currently contributing to the VDO.AI platform at Z1 Tech, working with PHP, Laravel, Node.js, ClickHouse, Redis, and MySQL to build high-performance backend systems and real-time features. Passionate about solving complex engineering problems, optimizing APIs and databases, and building reliable products that scale. Thank you 💜

projects.title: Shotkut
description: Built a full-stack stock media marketplace using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) with responsive and user-friendly UI.
Developed features for stock photos, videos, and assets browsing with advanced search, filters, and categories to enhance user experience.
Implemented secure authentication & authorization (JWT, bcrypt) for user accounts and contributor profiles.
Integrated payment gateway to support purchasing and subscription models for stock footage.

projects.title: MIS Application (Enterprise)
description: Architected and developed two sophisticated Management Information Systems (MIS) currently utilized at major airports.
Automated the passenger flight cancellation process post check-in, significantly reducing ground service response times.
Engineered internal enterprise tools that enhanced airport service efficiency through smart automation and real-time data processing.
Note: As this is a proprietary enterprise project developed for internal corporate use, public links and source code are restricted.

projects.title: OMDB Movie App
description: Developed a robust movie discovery platform using React.js and dynamic routing for seamless user transitions.
Integrated the Open Movie Database (OMDB) API to provide real-time cinema details, ratings, and high-quality poster assets.
Optimized the interface with a mobile-first responsive design, ensuring a high-performance experience across all screen sizes.

education.school: GL Bajaj Institute of Technology And Management
education.subject: Computer Science & Engineering
